channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Aggies win MWC opener over Wyoming, 70-67
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The undefeated streak is still going for the Aggies. Ian Martinez scored 17 of his 23 points in the second half to help Utah State defeat Wyoming 70-67 on Wednesday night at The Spectrum. Mason Falslev's layup with 35 seconds left stretched Utah State's lead to 70-64.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Creighton makes it 2 wins in less than a year against No. 1s, with Jayhawks latest to lose in Omaha
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — Creighton has played eight No. 1 teams in its basketball history, and the first six of those games weren't close. All were losses. The last two? Bluejays blowouts at the CHI Health Center.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Flagg leads the way as No. 9 Duke holds off Broome and No. 2 Auburn for an 84-78 win
item.description: Freshman sensation Cooper Flagg had 22 points and 11 rebounds to help No. 9 Duke push past No. 2 Auburn 84-78 in the SEC/ACC Challenge.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Unranked Creighton knocks off No. 1 Kansas behind Pop Isaacs' season-high 27 points
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — Pop Isaacs helped unranked Creighton upset No. 1 Kansas 76-63 on Wednesday night, scoring a season-high 27 points and matching his career high with six 3-pointers.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Celtics withstand 3-point spree to beat the Pistons 130-120
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Jaylen Brown had 28 points with nine assists and Kristaps Porzingis added 26 points and nine rebounds to lead the Boston Celtics to their ninth victory in 10 games, a 130-120 victory over the Detroit Pistons on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: McNeeley scores 17 points as No. 25 UConn rallies to a 76-72 win over No. 15 Baylor
item.description: Liam McNeeley scored 17 points and No. 25 UConn came back from an early deficit to beat No. 15 Baylor 76-72 in the Big 12-Big East Battle.
item.dc:creator: Jim Fuller, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Michigan flipped QB Bryce Underwood with some help from Oracle founder Larry Ellison and Tom Brady
item.description: BELLEVILLE, Mich. (AP) — Bryce Underwood, encircled by a slew of reporters and cameras, was relieved to make his commitment to Michigan official with his signature as college football signing day kicked off on Wednesday. “It's time for the next level,” Underwood said.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US prioritizes older veterans for 4 Nations Face-Off against Canada, Sweden and Finland
item.description: The United States chose dependable veterans over younger alternatives in picking its roster to compete against Canada, Sweden and Finland in the 4 Nations Face-Off, the first international tournament featuring the NHL’s best players in nearly a decade.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Aaron Rodgers says it's 'ridiculous' to think he needs the final 5 games to prove his value to Jets
item.description: Aaron Rodgers figures his football resume speaks for itself. So the New York Jets' quarterback doesn't feel the need to use the final stretch of this season to prove his value to the team and that he should be back next season. In fact, it's a notion the four-time NFL MVP finds “ridiculous.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The CFP rankings — and 'data points' — have left Miami, Ole Miss and South Carolina puzzled
item.description: CORAL GABLES, Fla. (AP) — Miami wants things reconsidered. So does South Carolina. The Big 12 is puzzled. And Mississippi coach Lane Kiffin turned toward social media to ask the College Football Playoff committee a question.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS and STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utes bring in 19 players on early signing day
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With the future of head coach Kyle Whittingham still up in the air, and the search for a new offensive coordinator ongoing, the Utes football program inked 19 new players on National Signing Day Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Matt Eberflus' dismissal from Bears came after 's--- show' postgame locker room speech: report
item.description: The Chicago Bears moved on from Matt Eberflus as head coach, but it didn't come before a tense locker room moment following yet another head-scratching loss for the group.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Falcons QB Cousins is looking to avoid interceptions, have bounce-back game in Minnesota homecoming
item.description: FLOWERY BRANCH, Ga. (AP) — This was not the homecoming scenario Kirk Cousins would have scripted. Cousins' return to Minnesota, his NFL home from 2018 through 2023, on Sunday comes as he is hearing speculation about his job security in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jaguars' Doug Pederson defends team for melee after Azeez Al-Shaair's illegal hit on Trevor Lawrence
item.description: Jaguars coach Doug Pederson defended his team on Wednesday after Texans player Azeez Al-Shaair hit Trevor Lawrence, inciting an intense brawl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Martina Navratilova 'mad' that Republicans are more outspoken than Dems about trans athletes in girls sports
item.description: Martina Navratilova again ripped Democrats on Wednesday in an X post for their tolerance of transgender athletes in women's and girls' sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trevor Lawrence placed on injured reserve, likely ending his season after dangerous hit
item.description: The Jacksonville Jaguars have placed Trevor Lawrence on injured reserve, likely ending his season after the hit he took earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jaguars coach Doug Pederson defends his team's reaction to illegal hit on QB Trevor Lawrence
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — Jacksonville Jaguars coach Doug Pederson has no problem with how his team reacted to the illegal hit on quarterback Trevor Lawrence, who was placed on injured reserve.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pro Picks: Falcons will upset the Vikings in Kirk Cousins' return to Minnesota
item.description: Pro Picks is a weekly column where AP Pro Football Writer Rob Maaddi shares his picks for upcoming games. For all previous Pro Picks, head here. ___ Six division matchups and Kirk Cousins’ return to Minnesota highlight a lighter Week 14 schedule.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah State announces 2025 signing class
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State interim head football coach Nate Dreiling announced portions of USU’s signing class on Wednesday, as part of the NCAA Early Signing Day. The class, which includes 20 total players, is comprised of 17 high school athletes and three junior college transfers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LPGA and USGA to require players to be assigned female at birth or transition before male puberty
item.description: Players must be assigned female at birth or have transitioned to female before going through male puberty to compete in LPGA tournaments or the eight USGA championships for females under new gender policies published Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Football recruiting: Where Bay Area’s top prep players signed
item.description: San Ramon Valley's Marco Jones (Texas A&M), De La Salle's Matthew Johnson (Oregon) among the players who put pen to paper on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: Josh Allen's creativity and Jameis Winston's risk-taking produce statistical firsts in the NFL
item.description: Inside the Numbers dives into NFL statistics, streaks and trends each week. For more Inside the Numbers, head here. ___ Josh Allen and Jameis Winston delivered signature performances in prime time that define their styles of play.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Flames honor Johnny Gaudreau, welcome his family back to Calgary in emotional pre-game tribute
item.description: The Calgary Flames paid tribute to longtime star Johnny Gaudreau on Tuesday night before their game against the Columbus Blue Jackets, months after the All-Star was killed while biking on a New Jersey road this summer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: John Elway, a Yankees draft pick, gets own baseball card with help from 'Seinfeld' co-creator Larry David
item.description: A new John Elway trading card has hit the market, but it's not one that relives his NFL glory days. The card shows Elway in a Yankees uniform.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Michigan's 7-foot newcomers earn themselves a nickname after their dynamic Big Ten debut
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Michigan has a nickname for its pair of 7-foot newcomers: Area 50-1. The tag was unveiled by the school on social media Tuesday night after Vladislav Goldin and Danny Wolf produced otherworldly numbers in a 67-64 victory at No. 11 Wisconsin to open the Big Ten schedule.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz commit 29 turnovers in 133-106 loss to OKC
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz lead the NBA in turnovers, and Tuesday night was their worst night yet. Utah committed a season-high 29 turnovers, 19 in the first half, as the Jazz go 0-4 in NBA Cup games with a 133-106 blowout loss at Oklahoma City.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jill Ellis steps down from club president position with San Diego Wave FC
item.description: Jill Ellis, club president of the San Diego Wave FC, will be stepping down from her role with the team, the club announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Flames honor the late Johnny Gaudreau and welcome his family back to Calgary
item.description: CALGARY, Alberta (AP) — The Calgary Flames paid tribute to longtime star Johnny Gaudreau on Tuesday night before their game against the Columbus Blue Jackets, months after the All-Star was killed while biking on a New Jersey road this summer.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz come up short against Lakers, 105-104
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Anthony Davis had 33 points and 11 rebounds, LeBron James added 27 points and 14 assists, and the short-handed Los Angeles Lakers beat the Utah Jazz 105-104 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Philadelphia defense, Tucker's misses help the Eagles to a 24-19 win in their showdown with Ravens
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Saquon Barkley vs. Derrick Henry was never supposed to be a head-to-head matchup. “It ain't basketball. It ain't like I go out there and tackle Derrick Henry,” Barkley said. “To be honest, I don't know if I really want to tackle Derrick Henry.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Gus Malzahn is leaving UCF to become Florida State's offensive coordinator, AP source says
item.description: Gus Malzahn is resigning as Central Florida's head coach to become Florida State's offensive coordinator, a person familiar with the hire told The Associated Press on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ohio State, Michigan players involved in melee after Buckeyes loss, multiple people pepper sprayed
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) — Michigan players planted their team flag at midfield of Ohio Stadium on Saturday afternoon after a 13-10 win over No. 2 Ohio State, leading to a brawl between players from both teams with police attempting to separate the sides and pepper spray being used.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, WGN 9

item.title: Utes close disappointing season with 28-14 victory
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (ABC4 Sports) - Utah forced three turnovers and scored two defensive touchdowns Friday night, including a 60-yard pick-6 by Zemaiah Vaughn, as the Utes snapped a seven-game losing streak with a 28-14 victory over UCF.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies blow 17-point fourth quarter lead in loss to CSU
item.description: FORT COLLINS, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State football team could not hold a 30-13 fourth quarter lead in its season finale at Colorado State, and the Aggies end the season with a 42-37 loss to the Rams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Bears fire head coach Matt Eberflus
item.description: The Chicago Bears have fired head coach Matt Eberflus following a six-game losing streak, with offensive coordinator Thomas Brown serving as interim coach.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9
